1. Run script `...`
2. Choose option `...`

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include terminal output if possible.

- **Shell**: [e.g., zsh 5.9, bash 5.2, PowerShell 7.4]

- **Package Manager Version**: [e.g., Homebrew 4.3.0]
